mapper.select: SELECT o.option_no AS optionNo, o.option_type AS optionType, o.option_name AS optionName, o.option_price AS optionPrice, o.option_carbon AS optionCarbon FROM menu_option_map m JOIN option_tbl o ON m.option_no = o.option_no WHERE m.menu_id = #{menuId}

SELECT menu_id AS menuId, store_id AS storeId, menu_name AS menuName, menu_info AS menuInfo, menu_image AS menuImagePath, menu_price AS menuPrice, menu_category AS menuCategory, menu_carbon AS menuCarbon, menu_status AS menuStatus FROM menu_tbl WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}

SELECT c.product_id AS productId, c.product_material AS productMaterial, c.product_emissions AS productEmissions, m.container_count AS containerCount FROM carbon_menu_map m JOIN carbon_definition_tbl c ON m.product_id = c.product_id WHERE m.menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carbon_menu_map (menu_id, product_id, container_count) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{productId}, #{count})
